titleStmt.title: SII 16.269: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 269. (A.R. No. 166 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPŪR, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar of the garuḍa-maṇḍapa in the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1491, Śukla, Āshāḍha śu. 12 corresponding to 1569 A.D., June 25.

The record is partly built in. It registers a gift of the income out of the ākulamantrāyam to the god by Chennapa-nāyaka, son of Komāra Timmā-nāyaka and grandson of Veligōṭi Peda Timmā-nāyaka of Rēcherla-gōtra. The donor is said to have obtained Kochcherlakōṭa-sīma as nāyaṅkara from Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Tirumalarājaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1491 Agunēṭi
śukla saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 12 lu śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra pratā
pa śrīsadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vidyā
nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛ
thivisāmrājyamuṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu Akhi
lāṁḍakōṭibraṁhmāṁḍanāyakuṁḍaina śrī
ceṁnakēśavarāyalaku rēcerlagōtrapavitru
laina veligōṭi pedatiṁmānāyanigāri pau
trulaina komāra tiṁmānāyanigāri putṛlaina
ceṁnapa nāyaniṁgāru Anaṁttamulaina da
ṁṇamulu samarpiṁci yicina dharmaśāsana
kramameṭlaṁnanu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
rāmarāja tirumalrājayadēvamahārā
juluṁgāru mā nāyaṁkarānaku bāliṁ
ci yicina kocerlakōṭasīmaku lōnaina mā
rakapurapu grāmānanu mā nagari Ākula maṁtrā
yānaku delivacē rokaṁ . yī tathātithi The continuation is built in.
Digital edition of SII 16.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
